Notice Of Hearing On Morgan Stanley Smith Barney Llcs Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar Mar-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC'S unopposed Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon is granted.

Order and judgment are signed.
